notes: SA CHECK V1.0.2-01 small update platform test.
This test release verifies that the in-app update prompt appears for build-suffix versions.
No user Work folder, settings, or cache will be cleared.
SA CHECK V1.0.2 Git update platform and theme apply update.
Update checks now read sacheck_update.json from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/spirmx/SACHECK/main/sacheck_update.json.
Installer downloads from the repository release folder.
Google Drive update channel was removed from the app flow.
Theme changes now wait for the Apply theme button.
SA CHECK V1.0.1 Finally theme and sidebar media update.
Fixed red Unknown control: FilePicker screen by registering FilePicker as a Flet service for the packaged runtime.
Added native Windows folder picker fallback for project folders, Work folder settings, and relink actions.
Fixed Settings screen crash where the sidebar/menu could disappear on some Flet runtimes.
Fixed Work folder picker in Settings so Choose Work folder opens the Windows folder dialog correctly.
Added App Theme presets: Ocean Pro, Candy Cartoon, Sakura Desk, Mint Studio, Sunset Pop, Night Arcade, and Graphite Focus.
Added sidebar profile media upload for PNG, JPG, WEBP, BMP, and animated GIF.
Added online/offline switch with confirmation in the sidebar.
Update button appears above the user guide button only when a newer version is available.
User guide layout is organized into clearer sections.
Offline-first app behavior is preserved; updates do not clear user Work folders, settings, or cache.
